stem: A SaaS analytics study surveys 40 subscribers and observes 6 positive outcomes out of 40 (15.0%). Estimate the true customer churn rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.15. Wilson 95% CI: [0.0706, 0.2907]. Point estimate: 0.1807.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
